summary: Historic first appearance of Bruce Hornsby with the final Gimme Some Lovin' performance; recording source and sound quality not specified.
review: Reviewers are thrilled by this show because it marks Bruce Hornsby's debut with the Dead and features the last-ever rendition of "Gimme Some Lovin'," a version played without Brent Mydland. No details about the tape source or audio fidelity are provided, so listeners should assume an unknown recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review emphasizes historic performance highlights; lack of technical information limits confidence in rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound quality, clarity, or mix details.
